docs.home.protocol.card.antiSpam.eyebrow.description: Eyebrow label for the custom challenges card on the docs home page.

docs.home.protocol.card.antiSpam.title.description: Title for the custom challenges card on the docs home page.

docs.home.protocol.card.antiSpam.body.message: Why each community can choose its own anti-spam policy instead of inheriting a global moderation stack.
docs.home.protocol.card.antiSpam.body.description: Description for the custom challenges card on the docs home page.

docs.home.protocol.card.moderation.eyebr.description: Eyebrow label for the local moderation card on the docs home page.

docs.home.protocol.card.moderation.title.description: Title for the local moderation card on the docs home page.

docs.home.protocol.card.moderation.body.message: What "no global bans" means in practice, and what still gets moderated locally by communities and apps.
docs.home.protocol.card.moderation.body.description: Description for the local moderation card on the docs home page.

docs.home.protocol.card.ownership.eyebro.description: Eyebrow label for the identity and ownership card on the docs home page.

docs.home.protocol.card.ownership.title.description: Title for the identity and ownership card on the docs home page.

docs.home.protocol.card.ownership.body.message: How keys, hosting delegation, and replaceable infrastructure fit together without turning service providers into custodians.
docs.home.protocol.card.ownership.body.description: Description for the identity and ownership card on the docs home page.

docs.home.roadmap.card.phase2.title.description: Roadmap card title for permissionless public RPC.

docs.home.roadmap.card.phase2.body.message: A proposal for multi-user Bitsocial RPC infrastructure with isolated users, scoped permissions, and durable ownership.
docs.home.roadmap.card.phase2.body.description: Roadmap card description for permissionless public RPC.

docs.home.roadmap.card.phase4.title.description: Roadmap card title for Bitsocial Chain.

docs.home.roadmap.card.phase4.body.message: The appchain layer proposed to power shared liquidity, decentralized domains, and durable incentives across apps.
docs.home.roadmap.card.phase4.body.description: Roadmap card description for Bitsocial Chain.

docs.home.roadmap.card.phase5.title.description: Roadmap card title for the decentralize all social media page.

docs.home.roadmap.card.phase5.body.message: The end-state: many public RPCs, competing apps, portable identities, and optional feed markets instead of captive platforms.
docs.home.roadmap.card.phase5.body.description: Roadmap card description for the decentralize all social media page.

docs.home.apps.card.5chan.body.message: A decentralized imageboard where anyone can create and own boards, and multiple boards compete for each directory slot.

docs.home.apps.card.seedit.body.message: An old.reddit-style alternative where communities are user-owned and compete for default listing slots.

docs.home.devtools.card.reactHooks.title.description: Developer tools card title for React Hooks.

docs.home.devtools.card.reactHooks.body.message: A hooks API for fetching feeds, comments, profiles, publishing content, and managing accounts - all without a central server.
docs.home.devtools.card.reactHooks.body.description: Developer tools card description for React Hooks.

docs.home.devtools.card.cli.title.description: Developer tools card title for Bitsocial CLI.

docs.home.devtools.card.cli.body.message: Command-line interface for running a P2P node, creating communities, and managing settings.
docs.home.devtools.card.cli.body.description: Developer tools card description for Bitsocial CLI.

docs.home.antispam.card.spamBlocker.eyeb.description: Anti-spam card eyebrow for Spam Blocker.

docs.home.antispam.card.spamBlocker.titl.description: Anti-spam card title for Spam Blocker.

docs.home.antispam.card.spamBlocker.body.message: A centralized risk-scoring service with OAuth and CAPTCHA challenges, dynamic rate limiting, and a network indexer.
docs.home.antispam.card.spamBlocker.body.description: Anti-spam card description for Spam Blocker.

docs.home.antispam.card.captcha.eyebrow.description: Anti-spam card eyebrow for Captcha Canvas.

docs.home.antispam.card.captcha.title.description: Anti-spam card title for Captcha Canvas.

docs.home.antispam.card.captcha.body.message: Generates image captchas with configurable characters, dimensions, and colors.
docs.home.antispam.card.captcha.body.description: Anti-spam card description for Captcha Canvas.

docs.home.antispam.card.voucher.eyebrow.description: Anti-spam card eyebrow for Voucher Challenge.

docs.home.antispam.card.voucher.title.description: Anti-spam card title for Voucher Challenge.

docs.home.antispam.card.voucher.body.message: Gate publishing behind unique voucher codes distributed by community owners to trusted users.
docs.home.antispam.card.voucher.body.description: Anti-spam card description for Voucher Challenge.

docs.home.antispam.card.evm.eyebrow.description: Anti-spam card eyebrow for EVM Contract Call.

docs.home.antispam.card.evm.title.description: Anti-spam card title for EVM Contract Call.

docs.home.antispam.card.evm.body.message: Verify on-chain conditions - token balances, NFT ownership, or any smart contract state - before allowing a post.
docs.home.antispam.card.evm.body.description: Anti-spam card description for EVM Contract Call.

docs.home.infrastructure.card.bso.eyebro.description: Infrastructure card eyebrow for BSO Resolver.

docs.home.infrastructure.card.bso.title.description: Infrastructure card title for BSO Resolver.

docs.home.infrastructure.card.bso.body.message: Resolves .bso domain names to public keys via ENS TXT records, with caching for Node and browser.
docs.home.infrastructure.card.bso.body.description: Infrastructure card description for BSO Resolver.

docs.home.infrastructure.card.mintpass.b.message: NFT-based proof-of-personhood via SMS verification, reducing sybil attacks like fake votes and ban evasion.

docs.home.infrastructure.card.telegram.e.description: Infrastructure card eyebrow for Telegram Bots.

docs.home.infrastructure.card.telegram.t.description: Infrastructure card title for Telegram Bots.

docs.home.infrastructure.card.telegram.b.message: Feed bots that monitor Bitsocial communities and forward new posts to Telegram channels.
docs.home.infrastructure.card.telegram.b.description: Infrastructure card description for Telegram Bots.

docs.home.contributor.card.playbooks.eye.description: Contributor reference card eyebrow for playbooks.

docs.home.contributor.card.playbooks.tit.description: Contributor reference card title for playbooks.

docs.home.contributor.card.playbooks.bod.message: Hooks setup, bug investigation, translation workflow, long-running agent handoffs, and other repo-specific operating rules.
docs.home.contributor.card.playbooks.bod.description: Contributor reference card description for playbooks.

docs.home.contributor.card.templates.eye.description: Contributor reference card eyebrow for templates.

docs.home.contributor.card.templates.tit.description: Contributor reference card title for templates.

docs.home.contributor.card.templates.bod.message: Reference documents for long-running work, including the machine-readable feature list template used by the repo workflow.
docs.home.contributor.card.templates.bod.description: Contributor reference card description for templates.

docs.home.hero.heading.message: Protocol notes, roadmap detail, and contributor playbooks.
